title: clinopodium ellipticum
intro: Clinopodium ellipticum, also known as Mountain Calamint, is a perennial herb native to North America, characterized by its distinctive elliptical leaves and fragrant foliage. Its medicinal properties lie in its essential oils, which contain compounds like calaminic acid and borneol, known for their anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Clinopodium ellipticum include relief from digestive issues, such as nausea and bloating, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate respiratory problems like bronchitis. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are commonly used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
